title: fragaria argentea
intro: Fragaria argentea, also known as the silver strawberry or white strawberry, is a species of strawberry native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and edible white or pale yellow fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Fragaria argentea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting overall digestive health. Fragaria argentea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used internally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
